use_cases: Display subscription pricing tiers with animated glass morphism effects
Show feature comparisons across different pricing plans
Create visually engaging pricing sections for SaaS landing pages
Generate dynamic pricing cards with WebGL shader backgrounds
Implement responsive pricing displays with dark mode support
ai_summary: An animated glass-morphism pricing card component featuring WebGL shader backgrounds, dark mode detection, and interactive ripple buttons. Supports feature lists with check icons and provides a visually striking display for subscription-based pricing tiers.
